1.0.4.en: fix modbus pairing issue with multiple devices

1.0.5.en: new icons, EMMA beta driver implementation

1.0.6.en: fix for Control registers written back on every app start

1.0.9.en: increased write response timeout, increase write attempts, pause polling during writes

1.0.11.en: extended timeout again and implemented logging for modbus write actions

1.0.13.en: add action flows on luna2000 emma modbus device and fixed some translation issues

1.1.4.en: add settings on luna2000 and sun2000 modbus devices

1.1.7.en: fix new flowcards if already in state charging or discharging

1.1.8.en: sun2000_emma_modbus now points meterPowerExportedCapability to meter_power.pv_total (register 30348 — cumulative PV yield). Homey will derive the daily delta from that counter, which matches what the FusionSolar portal reports as daily PV yield.

1.1.9.en: new flow cards for Registers 47075 / 47077 — Max Charge / Max Discharge Power

1.1.10.en: Max grid charge power now reads and writes register 47242 (active set point, matches FusionSolar) instead of 47244 (hardware ceiling). The setting is only synced when "Charge from grid" is enabled to avoid the hardware maximum overwriting the configured value.

1.1.11.en: fix issues with OpenAPI SUN2000 device and values

1.1.12.en: App failed to install on Homey Pro (Early 2019) with error incompatible_app_runtime_nodejs. Root cause was the "runtime": "nodejs" field in the app manifest, which is misinterpreted by the 2019 firmware as an unsupported runtime requirement. Removed the field — Node.js is the default runtime for SDK 3 apps and no explicit declaration is needed.
